title: Braised Dinuguan with Gobo and Burdock
description: A twist on the traditional Filipino dish, dinuguan is paired with the earthy flavors of gobo and burdock.
instructions: 1. Cut the gobo and burdock into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large pot, combine the pork belly and pig's blood. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the blood has thickened and the pork is cooked through.
3. Add the gobo and burdock to the pot and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
4. Season the dinuguan with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve the braised dinuguan hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
